narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है, जिसमें आर्थिक प्रतिबंध भी शामिल हैं। इन वजहों से रूस की हालत खस्ता हुई है
narratives.reasoning: The text explicitly links Russia's 'खस्ता' (deteriorated) condition to Western sanctions, framing the sanctions as the cause of Russia's decline. This highlights adverse outcomes for Russia, which is portrayed as a consequence of Western actions, fitting the narrative of predicting or reporting negative impacts on a nation due to Western policies.

narratives.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है
narratives.reasoning: The phrase 'प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है' (is bearing/suffering sanctions) portrays Russia as enduring or suffering from Western punitive measures. This language evokes sympathy by presenting Russia as a target of external pressure, aligning with the narrative of Russia being unfairly targeted or victimized.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है, जिसमें आर्थिक प्रतिबंध भी शामिल हैं। इन वजहों से रूस की हालत खस्ता हुई है, जबकि वह दुनिया का दूसरा शक्तिशाली देश माना जाता रहा है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote directly attributes Russia's 'खस्ता' (dilapidated) condition to the sanctions imposed by Western countries, catastrophizing the negative effects of those sanctions on Russia's standing as a powerful nation. This aligns with the definition of promoting the idea that Western sanctions have damaging consequences for the target (Russia), which is the core of this subnarrative.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Russia is the Victim: The West is russophobic
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है, जिसमें आर्थिक प्रतिबंध भी शामिल हैं। इन वजहों से रूस की हालत खस्ता हुई है
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote directly attributes Russia's weakened state ('खस्ता हुई है') to the sanctions imposed by Western countries, framing the negative outcome as a consequence of Western actions rather than Russia's own decisions in Ukraine.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Russia is the Victim: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: माना जा रहा है कि रूस ने पिछले दो सालों में सैन्य शक्ति मजबूत करने के लिए रक्षा क्षेत्र पर अधिक खर्च किया है और इस कोशिश में कई पैमानों पर पिछड़ गया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames Russia's decline in power rankings as a consequence of its necessary focus on strengthening military power, implicitly justifying its actions (the war effort) as a defensive or necessary measure that led to sacrifices in other areas, supporting the 'Russia as victim' narrative by portraying its struggles as an unintended cost of self-preservation.
